posts.author: Jorgen (Jorgen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Conversation at and updates.

Ability to add bullet point check boxes to a reply from a conversation

What are you trying to achieve

In the starting a new conversation - update we have the ability to add checkbox’s, links, tables, bullet points. Numbers. change the size of text, change colour of text, bold and underline. All these options are brilliant.

But when it comes to a reply, we no longer can have these options is this something that they’re looking to do in the future.

To keep work tidy and consistent would be very nice to be able to have the same ability to format throughout the whole conversation update thread.
